UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: User account demographic profile details containing basic contact info

userId.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID representing the owner of this account

email.description: The primary verified contact email of this account

name.description: The custom user profile name of this account

createdAt.description: The precise Firestore server timestamp signifying account registration date

updatedAt.description: The precise Firestore server timestamp of the latest profile edits

Resume.title: Resume
Resume.description: Job applicant resume profiles containing structured credentials, templates, and ATS grading insights

userId.description: The Firebase Authentication owner UID who created and can view this resume

title.description: Display title of the resume document

resumeData.description: Nested structured candidate data (education, work experience, projects, skills, certifications, etc.)

atsScore.description: The extracted ATS alignment matching score out of 100

atsAnalysis.description: Optional detailed ATS analysis breakdown metrics (missing keywords, suggestions, strengths)

templateId.description: The active presentation template identifier used to style PDF and layout sheets

createdAt.description: The precise date and time of original creation

updatedAt.description: The precise date and time of latest revisions

/users/{userId}.description: User collection mapped to individual Firebase Auth IDs

/resumes/{resumeId}.description: Full collection of all saved resumes
